picks.title: Free Comic Book Day at Saratoga Library
picks.why: Free Comic Book Day happens once yearly—grab new comics and meet fellow fans at Saratoga Library.

picks.title: La Traviata
picks.why: Opera San José's season finale: Verdi's tragic La Traviata with live orchestra and passionate storytelling.

picks.title: Les Miserables (Touring)
picks.venue: San Jose Center for the Performing Arts
picks.why: Les Misérables touring production—one of theater's greatest musicals, rarely in the Bay Area.

picks.title: The Geary Act Project: AANHPI Heritage Month
picks.why: Historian Connie Young Yu reveals hidden Chinese exclusion history during AANHPI Heritage Month at Saratoga Library.

picks.title: South Bay Dance Center presents New Beginnings
picks.why: South Bay Dance Center's New Beginnings showcase celebrates local dancers with two performances in Campbell.
